channel.title: Test Coffee Feed
channel.description: A minimal RSS fixture for scraper unit tests.

item.title: How to brew perfect espresso
item.description: A complete guide to extracting the ideal espresso shot, from grind size to pressure.

item.title: Ethiopian Yirgacheffe: Tasting Notes
item.description: Floral, bright, and complex — tasting notes from this Ethiopian single-origin gem.
